subject: A serene forest waterfall cascading over mossy rocks into a clear pool, surrounded by lush ferns and old-growth trees
description: A peaceful glade scene: a slim white waterfall pours over moss-covered rocks into a clear pool below, framed by dense green ferns and tree trunks. Warm golden sunlight filters down through the upper canopy. Color palette is rich greens with golden highlights. No figures present — pure landscape. Mood is tranquil, restful, cozy-in-the-wild.
foreground: Mossy rocks and lush ferns at the base of a small waterfall feeding a clear pool
background: Forest canopy with warm golden light filtering down between trunks
